description_long: This is a flag featuring three vertical stripes of blue, white, and red, mounted on a slender metallic pole with a rounded finial at the top. The flag fabric appears to be lightweight and slightly billowing, suggesting it is made of a flexible textile material. The pole is straight, metallic, and extends well beyond the height of the flag itself, providing a stable support. The flag's design is simple and iconic, with each color stripe occupying an equal third of the flag's width. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible damage or wear. The object is suitable for display in public urban spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or building entrances.
description: A tricolor blue, white, and red flag on a tall metallic pole, with a clean and well-kept appearance. The flag is lightweight and slightly billowing, mounted for public display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tricolor pattern of blue, white, and red vertical stripes, with the pole on the right.
description_view_1: Side view showing the flag edge-on, with the pole and a thin profile of the flag visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red, white, and blue stripes from left to right, with the pole on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flag edge-on, with the pole and a thin profile of the flag visible.
attribute_flag_design: The flag features three equal vertical stripes of blue, white, and red, representing the national flag of France. There are no additional symbols, text, or emblems; the design is simple and iconic.
